title: Sprint-Endurance Combo
description: Sprint power layered on fatigued legs
purpose: Sprint power layered on fatigued legs

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. You're building an engine here.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2: where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Relax and enjoy the ride. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Standing at 95-120 rpm, 200% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Easy miles make fast racing. Stop thinking and start pedaling.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This should feel easy. If you're breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This might feel too easy. That's the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Endurance pace: where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 200% FTP. Standing. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 200%, Cadence: 95-120 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. This is the foundation of all cycling fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 6/11. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 200% FTP. Standing. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 200%, Cadence: 95-120 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your friends are posting their VO2max workouts on Strava. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training your body to burn fat efficiently.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. This is where champions are made in the off-season.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 8/11. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 8. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is easy because it's supposed to be. Don't make it harder than it needs to be.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your future self will thank you for these base miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 10/11. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 10. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2 is like compound interest. Boring, but it builds wealth over time.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 65% FTP. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Zone 2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 60%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
